arms_mandatory_baselines: each survivor's own frozen baseline set, re-run at the added rungs

dependent_vars.definition: per-mechanism cost saved at iso-accuracy, per rung
dependent_vars.name: delta_cost_saved_iso_accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: task + kernel-covered-slice accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component)
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier NN-cleanup |lexicon|·D MACs on the ledger (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

n_planned.slope_plan: WLS on log-params, 90% CI; 4 rungs planned for any mechanism with expected |slope| < 0.15/decade (P8 §1.6)

endpoints.test: WLS slope on log-params per P1 common rules, 90% CI; 'shrinking' = CI excludes 0 from below; 'flat-or-growing' = lower bound > -10%/decade

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b rows HE7/HC5/HS13 (verbatim): HE7 — Measured range: ≥3 rungs per survivor; the programme's licensing instrument: one OOM past top rung, direction-only; anchor: Kaplan/Hoffmann extrapolation discipline, applied per mechanism. HC5 — Measured range: R1–R4 (135M–3B); fitted slope + 90% CI quoted to 7B (R5); beyond 7B direction-only with the no-published-verifier-lift-law caveat; this IS the extrapolation instrument for the correctness track. HS13 — Measured range: 5M–1B (T0–T3); to 7B direction-only via fitted 3-rung trend; frontier statements prohibited — no published frozen-vocabulary scaling law exists in either direction; anchor: frozen-glyph/arbitrary-identifier results + LCM penalty predict the null direction; a positive trend would contradict the literature and demands replication before extrapolation.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §3 HE7 kill criterion (verbatim): 'A mechanism whose Δ shrinks across three rungs (WLS slope on log-params per common rules, 90% CI excluding 0 from below) and whose fitted trend extrapolates below 10% cost-saving at 7B is toy-only: kept for the prospectus, excluded from any frontier pitch. Flat-or-growing requires the slope CI to exclude material shrinkage (lower bound > −10%/decade of params).' HC5 (verbatim): 'If the verifier's marginal catch/lift shrinks across R1→R3/R4 (WLS slope on log-params, 90% CI excluding 0 from below) and the fitted trend extrapolates below practical significance (default <10% relative error-reduction) at R5, the correctness pitch is declared toy-only.' HS13 (verbatim): 'advantage shrinking across all three rungs, or absent at T2 (TOST) ⇒ A1 closed at scale.' A positive HS13 triggers immediate independent replication before any claim.

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: F7 ≡ E7 — survivors-only scale-slope grid (HE7; HC5 verifier-lift slice; HS13/E7 slice iff E7-PRE opens; Tier 5, maintainer-gated: this record CANNOT freeze without budget.maintainer_signoff — P2 G-11)
